parameters.functionCode:
const p = $json; return [{ json: { ...p, emailSubject: `Important: Your ${p.policyType} coverage may need an update`, emailBody: `

Dear Client,

As part of our annual coverage review, we identified a potential gap in your ${p.policyType} policy.

Current coverage limits: ${p.currentLimits}
Estimated replacement cost: ${p.replacementCost}
Coverage gap: ${p.gapAmount} (${p.gapPercent}%)

Recommendation: ${p.recommendation}

We recommend scheduling a coverage review to discuss adjusting your limits. This is part of our standard client care — there's no cost or obligation.

This notice is provided as part of our professional duty of care. Please contact us to discuss.

` } }];
